rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE I-JUNG LIU 2009 REVOCABLE TRUST, U/D/T DATED 10/9/09
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Motion For Order Granting Petition For Approval Of Settlement, Or Alternately, Motionfor Order Vacating And Setting Aside Order Granting Petition For Approval Of Settlement, Declarations Of Your H. Liu And Ross Mclauran Madden, Request For Judicial Notice, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Denied. Neither reconsideration of the order approving the settlement agreement nor relief from default is appropriate on the facts presented. Petitioner joined in the request for the relief he now seeks to undo. His motion raises no new facts or law that could not have been raised at that time had he or his attorney paid attention to the settlement agreement whose approval they then sought. Their neglect in doing so is not excusable. Judge Lee has already denied parralel relief on essentially the same presentation. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Tuesday, November 3, 2015.
